detail: Violates must_preserve 'four options vary only in number/person'. Options mix tense AND form (lights, will be lighting, would light, lit) — this is A1, not A2. Answer 'lights' is grammatically correct, but the item tests tense/form selection, not number agreement.

T2 must_preserve requires distractors drawn from finite + at least two non-finite forms. Clone has only one non-finite option (to narrate) plus three finite forms (narrates, narrated, is narrating), violating the distractor-diversity constraint.
